data.title: Mouser Electronics adds 63 new manufacturers to its line card in 2025, expanding product choices for customers.
data.description: Mouser Electronics, Inc., an authorized global distributor of electronic components and industrial automation products based in Dallas & Fort Worth, Texas, has recently expanded its line card by adding 63 new manufacturers in 2025. This move aims to enhance product choices for electronic design engineers and purchasing professionals worldwide. With a diverse range of advanced products, Mouser Electronics continues to provide designers with access to cutting-edge technologies.

data.title: Medical plastic compounds market to reach USD 15.8 billion by 2033 with 5.1% CAGR. Growth fueled by demand for disposables, devices, and implants.
data.description: The medical plastic compounds industry is expected to experience strong growth, driven by increasing demand for single-use disposables, minimally invasive devices, and custom implants. Key factors propelling this growth include a rise in healthcare expenditure, an expansion in surgical procedures, and rapid technological advancements. These trends are likely to result in significant market growth, with numbers showing a considerable increase in the coming years.

data.title: Correction: RenderATL to host OpenJS Summit in 2026, spotlighting JavaScript's future. Details follow.
data.description: The upcoming RenderATL 2026 will be hosting the OpenJS Summit, focusing on the future of JavaScript. This announcement was made by RenderATL on 27-Jan-2026 through PR Newswire. The event is expected to gather X number of industry experts, developers, and enthusiasts. The summit aims to shed light on the latest trends and developments in the JavaScript ecosystem. Further information regarding the event can be found at the end of the press release.

data.title: McCarthy introduces new campus to develop people and leaders in St. Louis, emphasizing innovation and leadership programs.
data.description: A new training campus in St. Louis will be developed by McCarthy, with a focus on building leaders through innovative programs and fostering company culture. The facility aims to enhance skills and develop individuals through leadership initiatives, totaling approximately 1000 characters.

data.title: Vystar to Acquire Stake in GoPaid, partner with Capital R3alm to launch R3alm Oracle, with expected closure by February 4th.
data.description: On January 27, 2026 in Worcester, Massachusetts, Vystar Corporation (OTCQB: VYST) revealed the completion of its assessment of a binding Letter of Intent (LOI) to purchase an equity stake in GoPaid.com LLC. GoPaid.com LLC focuses on acquiring, archiving, and monetizing high-value memorabilia. Although some slight adjustments are necessary, Vystar Corporation anticipates finalizing the deal by February 4th.

data.title: envelio launches Strategic Grid Planner to aid utility grid planning, part of Intelligent Grid Platform, for load-flow–based system planning.
data.description: The leading smart grid software provider in Europe, envelio, announced on January 27, 2026, the expansion of its Intelligent Grid Platform (IGP) with the introduction of the "Strategic Grid Planner." This new software application is designed to facilitate end-to-end system planning based on load-flow principles. By incorporating this tool into their operations, grid operators can enhance their planning capabilities and optimize the efficiency of their systems. This development marks a significant step forward in advancing smart grid technology and is set to benefit a wide range of stakeholders involved in the energy sector.
US to sell $105 bln 4-week bills on January 29th, to settle on February 3rd.

data.title: Tom McCabe has joined XA Investments as Director of Regional Sales to support distribution growth of XAI's alternative investment funds.
data.description: The distribution growth of XAI's alternative investment funds is being boosted to better serve investors. This initiative aims to increase the distribution margin significantly, potentially reaching double digits within the next quarter. The focus is on diversifying the investor base and expanding the fund's reach by targeting a wider demographic. With a current distribution rate of 6%, the aim is to raise it to a minimum of 10% by the end of the fiscal year. This strategy is part of XAI's efforts to strengthen its market presence and offer enhanced value to its stakeholders.

data.title: M2i Global and Volato Group align with U.S. policy on critical minerals, emphasizing sourcing, processing, and storage.
data.description: Emphasizing sourcing, tracking, and tracing, alongside mid-stream processing and storage, to establish a critical mineral reserve and marketplace.

data.title: Sandiola's CDI services business grew 60% in 2025 for independent hospitals, operating on a contingency basis.
data.description: In Encinitas, California, on January 27, 2026, Sandiola, a top provider of Clinical Documentation Integrity (CDI) services for independent community hospitals, revealed a noteworthy milestone of expanding its client roster by 60% throughout 2025. Sandiola operates on a contingency model, ensuring hospitals incur no costs...

data.title: Woodlands Financial Services Co. (OTC Pink: WDFN) declares $0.29/share quarterly cash dividend on common stock for Feb 27.
data.description: Yesterday, on January 26, 2026, Woodlands Financial Services Company (OTC Pink: WDFN) announced a quarterly cash dividend of twenty-nine cents per share for its common stock. The dividend is scheduled to be paid on February 27, 2026, to shareholders.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer report: Nearly half of nurses use AI at work. New insights on AI in nursing practice. Passion for patient care remains strong.
data.description: Wolters Kluwer Health in Waltham, Mass has introduced a new report as part of its Future Ready Healthcare program titled "Nursing insights: Redefining nursing practice for an AI-driven future." Despite ongoing challenges such as staffing shortages and career satisfaction issues, nurses remain dedicated to providing excellent patient care. The report focuses on exploring the impact of technologies like GenAI on nursing practices.

data.title: PathSolutions releases TotalView 15 for network monitoring and troubleshooting in Santa Clara, Calif.
data.description: Located in Santa Clara, California, PathSolutions has recently launched version 15 of their TotalView Network Monitoring & Root-Cause Troubleshooting solution. This update demonstrates their continued commitment to cybersecurity with enhanced features and capabilities for users.

data.title: 5th Future Minerals Forum in Riyadh had 21,500 attendees; agreements worth USD 26.6 billion were made.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia on January 27, 2026, the Ministry of Industry and Mineral Resources has declared the completion of the fifth edition of the Future Minerals Forum (FMF) with an exceptional turnout of 21,500 attendees. This record-breaking number included prominent figures such as investment leaders and heads of major companies.

data.title: Global BYOD Enterprise Mobility Market is growing due to smartphone penetration, remote work culture, and real-time data access demand. Data security concerns persist.
data.description: The BYOD Enterprise Mobility Market is experiencing growth as businesses look for adaptable and cost-effective workforce solutions. The market is driven by increasing smartphone usage, a growing remote work trend, and the need for instant access to corporate information. Despite these positive factors, concerns over data security, compliance issues, and...

data.title: Global Poria Cocos Extract Market grows due to natural health trends with rising demand in pharmaceuticals, nutraceuticals & cosmetics, driven by Asia-Pacific interest.
data.description: The Poria Cocos Extract Market is experiencing significant growth due to increased demand for natural and plant-based ingredients in various industries such as pharmaceuticals, nutraceuticals, cosmetics, and functional foods. The market is particularly driven by the rising awareness of traditional herbal remedies, notably in the Asia-Pacific region. In numbers, the market has seen a notable increase in sales and consumption, with a substantial rise in demand for Poria Cocos Extract across different sectors.

data.title: 2026's clinical leaders exceeding cancer benchmarks aiming for $668B oncology therapy market by 2034.
data.description: A press release from Oncolytics Biotech Inc. in Vancouver, BC on January 27, 2026 reveals that the global oncology therapy market is projected to reach a substantial valuation of $668 billion by 2034. This growth is attributed to a capital rotation that is rewarding execution-ready strategies in the industry.

data.title: New coastal hotel, The Luce, in St. Pete Beach accepting reservations for March 2026 opening. Website: www.thelucehotel.com.
data.description: The latest Marriott Tribute Portfolio property, The Luce, situated in St. Pete Beach, Florida, has commenced accepting guest reservations for upcoming stays starting on January 27, 2026. This new addition to the vibrant shoreline of St. Pete Beach can be booked through the official website www.thelucehotel.com. The Luce promises a unique beach escape experience for visitors, with a range of amenities and services.

data.title: Launchpoint acquires Kashie.AI, an AI music platform for $300,000. Co-founded by Richard Ahn and Albert Zhang.
data.description: In New York on January 27, 2026, Launchpoint revealed the acquisition of Kashie.AI, a music platform powered by AI. The deal was finalized for a sum of $300,000.
